case_title: ANGEL E. DOMINGUEZ VS. RAFAEL A MOLINA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MOTION TO RE-SET PAYMENT SCHEDULE IS GRANTED. PAYMENTS ARE DUE ON FIRST OF MONTH STARTING NOVEMBER, 2011, AND ARE INCREASED TO $400.00 PER MONTH. PAYMENTS TO BE SENT AS DIRECTED IN PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION. PLAINTIFF TO RETURN KEY TO CAR TO DEFENDANT UPON SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF PAYMENTS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-16-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT PAID $1200.00 BY CHECK TO PLAINTIFF IN OPEN COURT FOR MISSED PAYMENTS FROM NOVEMBER THROUGH JANUARY 2012. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT, PER JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL TO JUL-16-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "TO REVIEW INSTALLMENT PAYMENT PLAN." IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-16-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-03-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MOLINA, RAFAEL A IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ, ANGEL E. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF IS NOT LIABLE TO DEFENDANT FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF ANY BILLS OR PAYMENTS MADE DURING THE RELATIONSHIP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NO RESPONSE FROM JUDGMENT CREDITOR AS TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (SC-220) CASE FILE ALONG WITH BLANK ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (SC-222) FORWARDED TO JUDGE MITCHELL
RESPONSE TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOMINGUEZ, ANGEL E.
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER SENT TO ANGEL E. DOMINGUEZ ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 6/26/13. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN MAIL RE: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION SENT TO PLAINTIFF

ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS. THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS APPROVED AND THE COURT ORDERS PAYMENTS OF $200 BE MADE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR ON THE 17TH OF EACH MONTH STARTING MAR-17-2011 UNTIL APR-17-2013

RETURNED MAIL (SENT TO ANGEL E. DOMINGUEZ)- ORDER AFTER HEARING AND NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-17-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "REPORT ON INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED,ON PLTFF'S CLAIM, FOR DEFT. RAFAEL A. MOLINA; POS FILED PRIOR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOMINGUEZ, ANGEL E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOLINA, RAFAEL A $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,500.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS A BUY-OUT OF THE PARTIES JOINT INTEREST OF THE LAND ROVER SUV. UPON PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF, THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO EXECUTE ALL NECESSARY DOCUMENTS TO EFFECT TRANSFER OF TITLE AND OWNERSHIP OF THE VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOMINGUEZ, ANGEL E. PETITION MAILED ON AUG 29, 2011

RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 1/18/2013 TO ANGEL E. DOMINGUEZ
